symmetry.notes: No verb pairs to evaluate in this snippet. N/A — no violation.

boolean-prefix.notes: isNotActive correctly flipped to isActive (positive boolean).

no-mental-mapping.notes: Single-letter vars removed. BUT 'result' (line 8) is vague — result of what? Should be e.g. 'closureConfirmation' or 'accountClosure'. 'amount' is generic — amount of what? Should be 'billingAmount' or 'finalAmount'. 'record' is also generic — should be 'accountRecord' or similar at the call site.

explicit-units.notes: elapsedMs and bufferSizeBytes both carry units. Good.

no-acronyms.notes: No abbreviations remain in the output.

deductions: 'result' is the quintessential vague name the rule targets — it maps to nothing without reading the called function
'amount' has no qualifier — amount of what? Money? Time? Items?
